acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: Welcome to the services provided by ARVIX PTE. LTD. ("we" or "company"). By accessing or using our websites, applications, and services ("services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
items: "Services" refers to all digital services we provide including web development, app development, technical consulting, SaaS subscriptions
"User" or "You" refers to any individual or entity accessing or using our services
"Content" refers to all information, data, text, software, music, sound, photos, graphics, video, messages, or other materials provided or generated through the services
"Account" refers to the registered account created by the user to use our services

account.title: 3. Account Registration and Security
account.content: Using certain services may require you to create an account. You agree to:
items: Provide accurate, complete, and current registration information
Maintain and promptly update your account information
Keep your account password confidential and be responsible for all activities under your account
Immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account
Not transfer your account to others or use another person's account

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
items: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Infringe on the intellectual property or other rights of others
Transmit any viruses, malware, or other harmful code
Interfere with or disrupt the normal operation of the services
Unauthorized access to our systems or data
Use services for fraud, spam, or harassment activities
Impersonate any person or entity, or make false statements about your identity

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
items: Our services, website, and related content are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws
We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the services
You retain intellectual property rights in content you provide to us
For custom development projects, intellectual property ownership will be stipulated in a separate service contract
You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works of our content without our written permission

payment.title: 6. Payment and Subscriptions
items: You agree to pay all fees at the published prices
Subscription fees will be charged at the beginning of each billing cycle
You may cancel your subscription at any time, but fees already paid for the current period are non-refundable
We reserve the right to adjust prices and will notify you in advance
Late payment may result in service suspension or termination

termination.title: 7. Service Termination
items: You may stop using the services at any time
We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for any reason
After termination, your access rights will immediately cease
Provisions regarding intellectual property, limitation of liability, and dispute resolution continue after termination
We will handle data after termination according to our Privacy Policy

disclaimer.title: 8. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Our services are provided "as is" and "as available" without any express or implied warranties. We do not guarantee that the services will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free, nor do we guarantee that results will be accurate or reliable. You expressly agree to use the services at your own risk.

limitation.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data loss, or loss of goodwill. Our total liability shall not exceed the total amount you paid for services in the past 12 months.

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify and hold ARVIX PTE. LTD. and its directors, employees, partners, and agents harmless from any claims, demands, losses, liabilities, or expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from your use of the services, violation of these terms, or infringement of others' rights.

governing.title: 11. Governing Law
governing.content: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Singapore, without regard to conflicts of law principles. You agree that Singapore courts have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising from these terms or the services.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may modify these terms from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated through website announcements, email, or in-service notifications. Continued use of the services indicates your acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.title: 13. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us:
